source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Geist for ornate ecosystem product UI with Noto Sans JP guidance for Japanese labels, crisp dashboard hierarchy, compact biodiversity metrics, and readable multilingual controls.
layout: Precise 8px grids, 8px radii, black wing-vein dividers, emerald active rails, gold focus states, ivory panels, dense ecosystem dashboard sections, and restrained birdwing-scale texture.

prompts.label: Transparent Birdwing Butterfly motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Birdwing Butterfly transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only an isolated birdwing butterfly full-body motif for a design-system catalog, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A birdwing butterfly with accurate anatomy, broad open wings, ornate tropical wing patterning, vivid emerald green wing panels, metallic gold yellow highlights, deep velvet black wing fields and margins, fine black vein lattice, slender dark body and antennae, crisp natural wing-scale texture.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show both wings, body, antennae, black margins, gold-green panels, and wing edges without cropping.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves emerald green, gold sheen, black velvet wing structure, and fine scale texture.
Chroma-key background: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for transparency removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no monarch, no blue morpho, no moth, no dragonfly, no flower, no leaf as the main subject, no tropical forest background, no text, no watermark, no props, no landscape, no second insect.

prompts.label: Light design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board titled exactly "Morphous Birdwing Butterfly" with subtitle "Birdwing Butterfly Design System - Light Mode". It must be an ornate ecosystem system derived from a birdwing butterfly in the tropical canopy.
Motif reference: birdwing butterfly with emerald green wing panels, metallic gold highlights, deep velvet black wing fields and margins, fine black vein lattice, tropical canopy shadow, and luminous leaf-filtered glints.
Canvas: wide 16:9 design-system board, high-resolution 4K-class source when available.
Resolution and legibility: large readable labels, clear section areas, no dense tiny token tables, clean professional UI documentation layout.
Required visible section headings, all present: Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard / Data, Forms, Tables, Command / Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows.
Tokens section: include clearly labeled shadcn/tweakcn semantic token chips for bg, fg, card, primary, primary-fg, secondary, muted, accent, border, input, ring, chart-1, chart-2, chart-3, sidebar, destructive.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command menu, search field, sidebar, top nav, metric cards, charts, loading, empty, error, success.
Typography: English and Japanese examples for product UI; use short labels only.
Style details: precise 8px grid, 8px radius on cards and controls, ornate black wing-vein dividers, green-gold primary actions, gold focus rings, ivory canopy-light surfaces, subtle butterfly scale texture samples, tropical canopy depth as quiet dark neutrals, ecosystem-map widgets and biodiversity dashboard accents.
Color palette: use only motif-derived colors: emerald birdwing green, gold wing flash, velvet wing black, canopy ivory, leaf-mist pale green, deep tropical canopy, muted bark gray, small destructive red only where needed. Avoid blue morpho colors, monarch orange, purple gradients, rainbow palettes, generic stock UI, glass transparency, random brands, watermark, and misspellings.

prompts.label: Dark design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board titled exactly "Morphous Birdwing Butterfly" with subtitle "Dark Mode". It must feel like the same ornate ecosystem system translated from the light board: birdwing butterfly motif, tropical canopy context, precise shadcn/tweakcn UI, not a new theme.
Motif reference: birdwing butterfly with emerald green wing panels, metallic gold highlights, deep velvet black wing fields and margins, fine black vein lattice, tropical canopy shadow, and luminous leaf-filtered glints.
Canvas: wide 16:9 design-system board, high-resolution 4K-class source when available.
Resolution and legibility: large readable labels, clear section areas, no dense tiny token tables, clean professional UI documentation layout.
Required visible section headings, all present: Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard / Data, Forms, Tables, Command / Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows.
Tokens section: include clearly labeled shadcn/tweakcn semantic token chips for bg, fg, card, primary, primary-fg, secondary, muted, accent, border, input, ring, chart-1, chart-2, chart-3, sidebar, destructive.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command menu, search field, sidebar, top nav, metric cards, charts, loading, empty, error, success.
Typography: English and Japanese examples for product UI; use short labels only.
Visual details: dark background from tropical canopy black and velvet wing margins, elevated cards in black-green ink, light text from ivory canopy glints, emerald active states, gold focus rings, golden chart lines, ornate black wing-vein dividers, butterfly scale texture samples, exact 8px radius on cards and controls, ecosystem-map widgets and biodiversity dashboard accents.
Color palette: use only motif-derived colors: canopy black, velvet wing black, emerald birdwing green, gold wing flash, pale canopy ivory, muted bark gray, leaf-mist pale green. Avoid blue morpho colors, monarch orange, purple gradients, rainbow palettes, generic blue-only theme, random brands, watermark, and misspellings.
